hooks.command: REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -x "$REPO/scripts/ambient-emit.sh" ] && jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // ""' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && "$REPO/scripts/ambient-emit.sh" file_edit "path=$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -x "$REPO/scripts/ambient-emit.sh" ] && jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r c; desc="${c:0:80}"; [ -n "$desc" ] && "$REPO/scripts/ambient-emit.sh" bash_call "cmd=$desc"; } 2>/dev/null || true
